title: UnsupportedAddressType error message claims Orchard is supported when it is not
description: TxBuildError::UnsupportedAddressType says 'only Sapling and Unified Addresses with a Sapling or Orchard receiver are supported'. Orchard is not supported — build_shielded_tx only adds Sapling outputs. A UA with only an Orchard receiver returns InvalidRecipient, not UnsupportedAddressType. The message on UnsupportedAddressType is wrong and will be seen by users providing transparent addresses. Fix: change the message to 'only Sapling addresses and Unified Addresses with a Sapling receiver are supported'.
close_reason: UnsupportedAddressType error string corrected: removed 'or Orchard'
